verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have seen so mighty miracles Before my eyes I have felt His Spirit move all over me And I can count the many blessings All the need supply I've seen so many souls That He sets free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now, don't get me wrong I've seen His mercy of His grace I've heard so many testify But right now it seems I know a lot of History And to me I must be sure That He's alive

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: That's not all there is to knowing Jesus There's a life that comes To knowing Him as Lord When it comes to knowing Christ It's all or nothing Until I have all I know that I need more

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: More than just a tearful emotion And more than just a men's philosophy More than just another pretty Bible The author is the One I long to see
